ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true, RecordType.Id ="012b0000000oQiv", $User.IsFinanceManager__c =false, NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"Storno")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"storno")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"STORNO")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"Cancellation")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"cancellation")), NOT(CONTAINS( InvoiceTitle__c ,"CANCELLATION")) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The Invoice Title must contain either "Storno" or "Cancellation" (IN020)
